title: rosa mollissima subsp. venusta
intro: Rosa mollissima subsp. venusta is a subspecies of the Rosa mollissima plant, commonly known as a species of rose native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Rosa mollissima subsp. venusta is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
